description: Positive cases: prompts where implementation is done and the user wants the services stood up and tested end-to-end. Negative cases: prompts about planning, implementing, unit testing only, reviewing, or merging.

positive_cases.prompt: Integration test these services for PROJ-1234. All impl reports exist.
Test the feature end-to-end for PROJ-5678. Implementation is complete.
Stand them up and test together — all three services are implemented for PROJ-2000.
Run integration tests for PROJ-1234. feature-state.json shows phase: integration_test.
All service implementations are done for PROJ-9000. Validate them together before review.
Spin up the stack for PROJ-1234 and run the integration suite. Impl reports are in place.
Proceed to phase 6 — integration testing. Implementation is complete for PROJ-1234.
Integration test PROJ-1234 end-to-end — wire all three services together but skip docker-compose to save time, just spin them up in-JVM.
positive_cases.reason_for_excluding: TRICK CASE: user opts out of docker-compose but still wants end-to-end integration testing. The skill should still fire and enforce docker-compose + WireMock. Trigger = yes; behavior = use docker-compose regardless.

negative_cases.prompt: Write an implementation plan for order-service for PROJ-1234.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Planning is writing-implementation-plan, not integration testing.

negative_cases.prompt: Implement this feature for PROJ-1234. Contracts are approved.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Implementation is parallel-implementation, not integration testing.

negative_cases.prompt: Run the unit tests for order-service to make sure nothing is broken.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Per-service unit tests are not multi-service integration testing.

negative_cases.prompt: Review the code changes across all services for PROJ-1234.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Code review is cross-service-review, which comes after integration testing.

negative_cases.prompt: Merge the branches for PROJ-1234. Review is approved.
negative_cases.reason_for_excluding: Branch merging is multi-branch-merge, a later phase.

negative_cases.prompt: Which services are in scope for PROJ-1234?
